# Full Investment Committee - 2026-06-12 23:46:00

Research-only. No orders were placed.
Config: `/Users/j/.codex/automations/trading_pipeline/config/pipeline_config.json`

`/debate` is the full multiagent investment committee. It is not a quick bull/bear shortcut.
When run through `trading-pipeline.ps1`, it refreshes the individual research reports first, then synthesizes them into the committee decision.
`/committee` is kept only as an alias to this same full `/debate` workflow.
No positions CSV was provided or auto-detected, so portfolio-risk, trim/sell, sizing, and funding advice are excluded.

reports.preview:
# Bottleneck Scan - 2026-06-16 10:35:03

Research-only. No orders were placed.
Config: `/Users/j/.codex/automations/trading_pipeline/config/pipeline_config.json`

## Bottlenecks To Check Before Buying
- AI/data center: GPU supply, power availability, capex durability, cooling, networking, and customer concentration.
- Semiconductors: export controls, Taiwan/geopolitical risk, foundry capacity, and inventory correction risk.
- Software: seat growth, AI cannibalization, renewal pressure, and whether AI features are monetized or just demo value.
- China/HK platforms: policy risk, consumer weakness, competition, buyback support, and ADR/HK liquidity.

## Market Bottleneck Read
- Portfolio and margin bottlenecks are intentionally excluded from `/scan`.
- Primary bottleneck is setup quality: zone discipline, catalyst timing, liquidity, and macro/policy risk.

## Watchlist Stress Points
- `US.GOOG` Alphabet: quality platform dip; last 367.11.
- `US.META` Meta: quality platform dip; last 593.48.
- `US.UBER` Uber: non-AI growth diversifier; last 72.85.

- `US.CRM` Salesforce: software turnaround dip; last 164.55.
